title: Liberia Anti-Corruption Technology Program
description: Africa's first blockchain-based anti-corruption initiative. Launched in Monrovia — equipping youth, innovators, and public institutions with tools that make corruption structurally impossible. Scaling to all 15 counties through NGO, university, and government partnerships.

title: National Youth Hackathon Against Corruption
description: Annual hackathon building blockchain solutions for government transparency and accountability across Liberia.

title: Land Registry Pilot
description: Immutable property records eliminating title fraud and enabling land as loan collateral for the first time.

title: Blockchain in Civic Education
description: Integrating blockchain literacy into Liberia's national civic curricula, reaching students in every county.

title: Builder Grants Program
description: Quarterly grants for African developers, researchers, and entrepreneurs building on Alkebuleum protocols.
